# cloudless_ssh_key (Resource)

An SSH public key registered with Fluence and reusable across VMs.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudless_ssh_key" "me" {
  name       = "my-key"
  public_key = "ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIKgJIjnDg1DjqOOxINs78oU3f7PJXIyq9uiNocNVhXNx user@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable name shown in the Fluence UI and CLI. Changing forces replacement; the Fluence API has no rename endpoint.
- `public_key` (String) The OpenSSH-formatted public key (ECDSA / RSA / ED25519).

### Read-Only

- `algorithm` (String)
- `fingerprint` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `user_id` (String)
